ogTitle: Yarpturk vs Yarra Junction: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Yarpturk and Yarra Junction.
heading: Yarpturk vs Yarra Junction — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Yarpturk, Victoria and Yarra Junction, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Yarpturk has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Yarra Junction (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Yarpturk or Yarra Junction safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Yarpturk has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Yarra Junction scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Yarpturk scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. Yarra Junction scores 29/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Yarpturk or Yarra Junction?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Yarpturk has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
